description_long: This is a futuristic, streamlined airplane with a predominantly white fuselage accented by blue wings and tail surfaces. The wings are sharply swept back and feature multiple angular segments, giving the aircraft a high-tech, advanced appearance. The rear of the airplane is equipped with a prominent, circular green engine exhaust, suggesting a jet or advanced propulsion system. The cockpit is smoothly integrated into the forward section, with blue-tinted windows blending into the body. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, all with blue highlights. The overall design is sleek and aerodynamic, with visible panel lines and subtle surface detailing.
description: A sleek, white and blue futuristic airplane with swept, angular wings and a prominent green rear engine. The design features a streamlined cockpit and advanced aerodynamic surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, integrated cockpit, and the symmetrical, swept-back blue wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, angular wing structure, and the green engine exhaust at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the circular green engine exhaust, the full span of the swept wings, and the tail assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue wing configuration and the streamlined body profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, multi-segmented wings and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with prominent circular exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear; specific units not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy integrated into the fuselage.
